title: Junior Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Kolkata team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Prudential Life Global Group:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group!
